seoTitle: College Grove vs Collie — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between College Grove and Collie. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: College Grove vs Collie: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in College Grove and Collie.
heading: College Grove vs Collie — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between College Grove, Western Australia and Collie, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Collie has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to College Grove (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is College Grove or Collie safer from flooding?
faq.answer: College Grove has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Collie scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: College Grove scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Collie scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in College Grove or Collie?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Collie has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.83% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
